title: Reception baseline assessment: assessment and reporting arrangements (ARA)
body: "This document sets out the statutory assessment and reporting requirements for the RBA.  It applies to the following schools with a reception cohort:   maintained schools, including maintained special schools academies, including free schools Ministry of Defence (MoD) schools   This document is for:   all staff responsible for administering the RBA  headteachers and senior leadership teams governors and trustees   "
